name: Common Room Community Intelligence API
what_it_does: AI-powered community intelligence platform with REST API — aggregating signals from GitHub, Discord, Slack, LinkedIn, Twitter, and Stack Overflow to identify high-intent community members, surface buying signals, and enable developer-led growth and community-qualified leads.
use_cases: Querying community member intent signals for sales team outreach prioritization
Syncing high-intent community members to CRM for developer-led growth workflows
Monitoring community health metrics across platforms via API for executive reporting
Identifying power users and potential customers from community engagement patterns
Integrating community signal data into automated nurture workflows via webhook
not_for: Pure community management without commercial signals focus
Simple community analytics without sales/growth integration
best_when: A product-led growth company wants to identify buying intent from community signals and convert community engagement into pipeline via CRM integration.
avoid_when: You run a pure open-source community without commercial goals, or need simple community analytics without sales intelligence.

auth.notes: API token from Common Room settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Webhook for community signal events.

pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing. US-based (Seattle). Founded 2020. Backed by $50M Series B from Greylock. AI-powered signal detection is key differentiator vs Orbit. Strong integration with Salesforce and HubSpot for developer-led growth. Product-led growth company focus.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for community members, segments, signals, and workflows. Bearer token auth. Webhook for signal events. Documentation accessible but requires enterprise account. AI-powered signal scoring — query API to understand current scores. Enterprise pricing limits accessibility for evaluation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Member reads idempotent. Segment creation idempotent by name. Signal reads always idempotent. Workflow triggers create new events.
known_agent_gotchas: AI signal scores are inferred — query API for current thresholds and context
Enterprise pricing — annual commitment required for API access
CRM sync (Salesforce, HubSpot) requires separate integration configuration
Community member identity resolution across platforms is automatic but may have errors

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Community member data aggregated from public sources — privacy considerations for PII handling. Standard SaaS security.
